name: universal-code-registry
description: Source-owned registry for audited reusable code blocks across Bun, Node, and Next projects.

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:examples
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter @ucr/schema build && bun run --filter @ucr/core build && bun run --filter @ucr/cli build
scripts.build:examples: bun run --filter @ucr/example-bun-service build && bun run --filter @ucr/example-next-app build && bun run --filter @ucr/example-node-service build
scripts.clean: bun run clean:packages && bun run clean:examples
scripts.clean:packages: bun run --filter @ucr/cli clean && bun run --filter @ucr/core clean && bun run --filter @ucr/schema clean
scripts.clean:examples: bun run --filter @ucr/example-bun-service clean && bun run --filter @ucr/example-next-app clean && bun run --filter @ucr/example-node-service clean
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:examples
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter @ucr/schema typecheck && bun run --filter @ucr/core typecheck && bun run --filter @ucr/cli typecheck
scripts.typecheck:examples: bun run --filter @ucr/example-bun-service typecheck && bun run --filter @ucr/example-next-app typecheck && bun run --filter @ucr/example-node-service typecheck
scripts.docs:prepare: bun run registry:build && bun run docs:catalog:build
scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:prepare && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:prepare && vitepress build docs
scripts.release:cli: bun run build:packages && bun run scripts/build-cli-binaries.ts
scripts.release:artifacts: bun run registry:build && bun run release:cli && bun run release:checksums
